title: Sirsi Marikamba Temple
tagline: Sirsi Marikamba Temple — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: Sirsi Marikamba Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Marikamba Devi (Durga Devi), located in Sirsi, Karnataka, It is also known as Marigudi.
overview.description: Sirsi Marikamba Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Marikamba Devi (Durga Devi), located in Sirsi, Karnataka, It is also known as Marigudi. It was built in 1688. Sri Sirsi Marikamba Devi is the "elder sister" of all Durga Devi's in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Sirsi, Karnataka
topPlaces.description: Sirsi or Shirasi is a city located in the Uttara Kannada district of Karnataka state in India. Administratively, Sirsi functions as the headquarters for the eponymous taluk, subdivision, and educational district.

topPlaces.name: Kalkuni
topPlaces.description: Kalkuni is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Malavalli taluk of Mandya district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Halasinakatte
topPlaces.description: Halasinakatte is a remote village located in Sirsi Taluk of Uttara Kannada district of Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Arsikeri
topPlaces.description: Arsikeri or Arasikere is a hobli and major village/town in the Harapanahalli Taluk of Vijayanagara District in the state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the 15km away from Harapanahalli city in Karnataka, and it was lied in state highway 47.

topPlaces.name: Navilgone
topPlaces.description: Navilgone is a village in Honavar taluk, India. Several famous Indians are natives of Navilgone.

topPlaces.name: Achanalli
topPlaces.description: Achanalli is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Sirsi taluk of Uttara Kannada district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Agasal
topPlaces.description: Agasal is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Sirsi taluk of Uttara Kannada district in Karnataka.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sirsi Marikamba Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sirsi Marikamba Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sirsi Marikamba Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Hubli Airport (87 km) and the nearest railway station is Hubballi Junction (87 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sirsi Marikamba Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sirsi Marikamba Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sirsi Marikamba Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Sirsi Marikamba Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sirsi Marikamba Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sirsi, Karnataka, Kalkuni, Halasinakatte, Arsikeri, Navilgone.
